properties.name: dismiss-button-aria-label
properties.description: Allows setting a custom aria-label for the dismiss button.

properties.name: removable
properties.description: Adds a close button to the Alert.

properties.name: placement
properties.description: The placement of the Alert on the screen.

properties.name: headline
properties.description: Adds a headline to the Alert.

properties.name: text
properties.description: The main text of the Alert.

properties.name: icon
properties.description: The icon to display in the Alert. Takes precedence over the connotation's icon.

properties.name: timeoutms
properties.description: Timeout after which the Alert will close.

properties.name: connotation
properties.description: Sets an appropriate icon / icon color for the connotation.

events.name: open
events.description: Fired when the Alert is opened

events.name: close
events.description: Fired when the Alert is closed

slots.name: main
slots.description: The main content of the Alert.

slots.name: action-items
slots.description: Add action items to Alert using this slot.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Add an icon to the component.
